title: Why corporate wellness programs fail
copy:
Most corporate wellness programs are gym memberships with extra steps.

We just wrapped week 4 of our Summer Strength Challenge - and 87% of corporate-sponsored participants are still showing up.

The difference? Three things:

1. Coach accountability, not just access
2. Peer cohort, not anonymous gym floor
3. A finite goal (30 days), not vague 'wellness'

If you're an HR lead looking to actually move the needle, DM us.
